course_title: PRIVATE REAL ESTATE EQUITY INVESTMENT I: ANALYSIS AND STRUCTURES
description: Introduction to real estate private equity investment focused on the analysis, terms, return metrics, and structures used to make real estate private equity investment decisions.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: REAL EST 415, declared in Business: Real Estate and Urban Land Economics graduate programs, or the Business Exchange program
